hero.blurb: Hi, I'm Eldie Arubang — a Process Expert front-end developer with 15 years of crafting intuitive, performant web interfaces. I design systems that feel obvious, build experiences that feel inevitable.

about.sub: Over a decade in the trenches — from Manila WordPress shops to Henkel's Asia Pacific service center. I bridge design and engineering so neither side has to compromise.
about.objective: A results-driven Front-End Developer & UI/UX Designer with over a decade of experience designing and developing web applications, optimizing user experience, and implementing creative digital solutions.
about.objectiveSecondary: Passionate about crafting intuitive and visually appealing interfaces that enhance usability and engagement.

skills.title: Front-End Engineering
skills.description: Modern JS frameworks, semantic markup, scalable CSS, web performance.

skills.title: UI / UX Design
skills.description: Wireframes, design systems, prototypes, usability principles, accessibility.

skills.title: Shopify & Liquid
skills.description: Custom themes, sections, snippets, theme app extensions, and storefront customization.

skills.title: CMS & Backend
skills.description: Custom WP themes, plugins, server-side rendering, data modeling.

skills.title: Creative Direction
skills.description: Brand storytelling, visual identity, art direction across surfaces.

experience.body: Collaborated with stakeholders to design and maintain internal calculators and UI/UX for web applications. Used React.js and vanilla JavaScript to enhance user experience across global tooling.
Developed custom WordPress themes and plugins, ensuring pixel-perfect designs. Converted PSDs to responsive HTML with a focus on UI/UX enhancements.
Created custom templates and post types based on mockups. Designed and developed website functionalities and optimized sites for SEO. Produced graphics and logos for in-house projects.

Advocated for web interaction best practices with a focus on consistency and usability. Built reusable code libraries and validated user input. Worked on an e-commerce platform for an Australian client, customizing functionalities with JavaScript.
Led front-end work across multiple e-commerce and content sites. Built reusable code libraries, validated user input, and drove a culture of consistency and usability across teams.

First professional role — built dynamic websites with PHP and MySQL, hand-coded HTML/CSS/JavaScript front-ends, and produced supporting visuals. Designed page layouts, logos, and marketing collateral that aligned with each client's brand. The foundation that shaped everything I do today.

education.school: STI College · Software Development track · Philippines
React, TypeScript, Vue, Shopify Liquid, modern CSS, design systems

contact.sub: Open to remote, hybrid, or onsite (Metro Manila) engagements. Currently accepting select projects starting Q2 2026.
